summary: Makes Planban updates and board launches smoother, faster, and more reliable for local installs.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Planban now ships with its built local web app, so installed copies can open boards more reliably from the plugin and MCP tools. This update also tightens the local update checks, keeps the public install dependency set current, and includes polish for archive-column reveal and board-opening commands.
